name: node-eslint-visitor-keys

description:
Constants and utilities about visitor keys to traverse AST
This module, eslint-visitor-keys, provides onstants and utilities
about visitor keys to traverse AST.
.
An abstract syntax tree (AST) is a tree representation
of the abstract syntactic structure of source code
written in a programming language.
Each node of the tree denotes a construct
occurring in the source code.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use node-eslint-visitor-keys because Constants and utilities about visitor keys to traverse AST.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use node-eslint-visitor-keys as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair node-eslint-visitor-keys with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `node-eslint-visitor-keys --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
